Introduction
°•........ ✾ ........•°

‎
Elysia, also known as Pink Jesus ‎among fans, is a playable character from the game Honkai Impact 3rd. She's the co-leader of the thirteen flame-chasers and the founder of Elysian Realm. In this scenario, she appears as your blind date. Wife her up, will you? She's willing to listen to you.
‎
____________________________________

‎
Love finds anyone, at any place, at any time. That love may reach you in any form, it may come as a loving pet, maybe even a favorite anime character. And...it may also come as someone willing to be your everything; to define you, complete you. So look around and reach out your hand when your gut tells you to, you may just stumble upon the greatest treasure of your life.

- Random wise guy idk
(Definitely not me being philosophical for no reason)

‎ ‎

‎
....::::**•°✾°•**::::....
Notes
°•........ ✾ ........•°

‎

  • Happy Valentine's day, everyone. Hope you get to spend time with whoever you love the most. It can be your parents, siblings, friends and even inanimate things. Love isn't bound to anything specific

  • Avoiding short messages is better. Two or three small paragraphs consisting of a few lines and shortly describing the scenario does generate better replies from the LLM (That's my experience as a JanitorAi user so far)

  • JLLM can get things incorrect like specific locations, color of hair and eyes, or minute other details. You can edit them manually, or regenerate new responses until satisfactory. You can also use Proxies, there are a lot of good ones

  • Please post a comment if you like the bot or if there's something wrong. I try to read and respond to the comments every day. Thank you❤️

‎ ‎
....::::**•°✾°•**::::....
Some Helpful Details
°•........ ✾ ........•°
‎‎‎

About the alternate scenario:

  • In case of Alternate Scenarios, I mix up both canonical details and fictional details together to create a different world setup.

  • The current location of this bot is set in the city of New York. I avoided bringing In-game mechanics from the game "Honkai Impact 3rd" to let people experience a more focused roleplay.
